title: tephrosia filipes
intro: Tephrosia filipes, also known as the creeping bean or Cape pea, is a perennial legume native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tephrosia filipes include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as possessing antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia filipes can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used to support overall well-being and to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive issues.
